// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class WithErrorBindingsImpl extends WithErrorBindings:
    import WithErrorBindingsImpl.*

    def failable(x: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Outcome[Int] =
        val retVal = facade.failable(x).asInstanceOf[Int]
        val __errno = KoffiFacade.errno()
        val __kyoResult = retVal
        Ffi.Outcome.fromValueErrno(__kyoResult.toLong, __errno)
end WithErrorBindingsImpl

object WithErrorBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.WithErrorBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_we"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("failable", "failable", "int", Seq[js.Any]("int".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end WithErrorBindingsImpl
